metadata.source_document: Merchandise Supplier Add Delivery Location User Manual 30-07-2025.pdf
metadata.source_location: SharePoint - MDMInternal / RRSR and NVR Portal
metadata.process: Add Delivery Location for Merchandise (Trading) Supplier

faqs.question: What is the Add Delivery Location process for?
alternate_phrasings: what does add delivery location do
faqs.answer: The Add Delivery Location process allows registered Merchandise (Trading) Suppliers to add a delivery location for goods procured by Reliance Retail Ltd and its Group/Associate Companies. Articles meant for in-house consumption and Services are not supported by this application.

faqs.question: Who can add a delivery location?
alternate_phrasings: can new vendors add delivery location
when can I add delivery location
faqs.answer: Users can add a delivery location only after they receive their login credentials, which are issued once their registration request is approved by the respective Category Manager and Commercial Manager.

faqs.question: What is the portal link?
faqs.answer: You can access the portal at https://supplierregistration.ril.com/

faqs.question: What are the steps to add a delivery location?
alternate_phrasings: all steps in add delivery location
faqs.answer: There are 11 steps: (1) Login, (2) Create New Request, (3) Select Location Type, (4) Select Product Category, (5) PAN Details, (6) GSTIN Details, (7) Contact Person Details, (8) MSME Details, (9) FSSAI Details, (10) Bank Details, and (11) Submit the Form.

faqs.question: How do I get my login credentials?
faqs.answer: After your registration is approved, an email containing your user ID and a link to create your password is sent to you. Use these credentials to log in to the portal.

faqs.question: How do I create a new delivery location request?
alternate_phrasings: where is add delivery location button
faqs.answer: After logging in, click on 'Delivery Location' and then click on 'Add Delivery Location'. Fill the form with the appropriate vendor details.

faqs.question: Which Location Type should I select?
faqs.answer: Always select Location Type as 'Distributor' from the drop-down menu.

faqs.question: How do I select Product Category and Store Format?
faqs.answer: From the drop-down, choose the vendor category under which you are registered. Then choose the appropriate Store Format (also under which you are registered) from its drop-down menu.

faqs.question: Is PAN mandatory?
alternate_phrasings: is PAN required for delivery location
faqs.answer: Yes. PAN is mandatory for each category.

faqs.question: What are the PAN validation rules?
faqs.answer: PAN must follow these rules: (1) 10 characters long, (2) First 5 characters must be alphabets, (3) 4th character must be one of C, P, H, F, A, T, B, L, J, or G, (4) 6th to 9th characters must be numeric, (5) Last character must be an alphabet.

entities.value: C, P, H, F, A, T, B, L, J, G

faqs.question: What does the 4th character of PAN mean?
alternate_phrasings: what does P or C mean in PAN
faqs.answer: The 4th character indicates the entity type: C - Company, P - Individual, H - HUF, F - Firm/LLP, A - AOP, T - Trust, B - BOI, L - Local Authority, J - Artificial Juridical Person, G - Government Agency.

faqs.question: What should I enter in the NSDL PAN Name field?
faqs.answer: Type the name on your PAN card exactly as maintained in NSDL. Ensure the 'Y' flag is displayed in the PAN name validation.

faqs.question: What format should the PAN document be in?
alternate_phrasings: upload PAN as PDF or JPG
faqs.answer: Upload the scanned copy or E-PAN file of the vendor's PAN in PDF or JPG format.

faqs.question: What documents are needed for Proof of Proprietorship?
alternate_phrasings: documents when vendor name differs from proprietor
faqs.answer: If the 4th PAN character is 'P' and the Vendor/Bank account name differs from the Proprietor's name, merge a Proof of Proprietorship document with the PAN copy and upload in the PAN document section. Accepted documents: (1) Shop & Establishment Certificate, (2) Confirmation letter from a scheduled Bank (RTGS mandate form not valid), (3) Service Tax Registration Certificate, (4) IEC Certificate, (5) Trade License, (6) Any Govt./Local authority certificate showing both firm and proprietor name, (7) UDYAM Registration Certificate, (8) GST Certificate.

faqs.question: How is GSTIN populated?
alternate_phrasings: GSTIN based on PAN and state
faqs.answer: Based on the PAN and State code you provided, the GSTIN for the respective state is automatically fetched into the GSTIN field for checking and editing if needed.

faqs.question: What if I have multiple GSTINs for the same state?
alternate_phrasings: more than one GSTIN same state
faqs.answer: If you have multiple GSTINs for the same state, fill the correct GSTIN number and ensure it is supported by the GSTIN copy you upload.

faqs.question: Should GSTIN match the state address?
faqs.answer: Yes. The GSTIN number must belong to the respective state as per the address section.

faqs.question: What if the vendor is GST registered?
faqs.answer: If the vendor is GST registered, upload the scanned copy of the GSTIN certificate in the document field.

faqs.question: What if the vendor is not GST registered?
faqs.answer: If the vendor is not GST registered, upload the 'No GSTIN Declaration' form. You can download the template from the Download section on the top navigation bar of the portal.

faqs.question: What address proof is needed for a Proprietorship/Individual without GST?
alternate_phrasings: supporting documents for No GST declaration
faqs.answer: For Proprietorship Firm or Individual vendors without GST registration, merge an address proof along with the No GST declaration. Accepted documents: (a) Water Bill, (b) Telephone bill (landline or postpaid mobile), (c) Electricity bill, (d) Income Tax Assessment Order, (e) Election Commission Photo ID card, (f) Proof of Gas Connection, (g) Rent Agreement, (h) Bank Account Passbook copy (first page with account name, number, and address).

faqs.question: Whose contact details should I provide?
alternate_phrasings: can I add Reliance employee contact
faqs.answer: Provide the details of your contact person. Reliance employee contact details are strictly prohibited.

faqs.question: What is the UDYAM (MSME) number format?
faqs.answer: Format: UDYAM-XX-XX-XXXXXXX. The document states it should be 16 characters; first 5 are 'UDYAM', next 2 are alphabetic letters (A-Z), next 2 are numeric digits (0-9), and the last 7 are numeric digits. Each part is separated by a hyphen.

entities.value: Document states 16 characters; verify against your certificate

faqs.question: What date do I enter in the UDYAM Date of Issue field?
faqs.answer: Refer to the 'Date of UDYAM Registration' section on your UDYAM (MSME) certificate and select the matching date from the calendar in the 'Date of Issue' field.

faqs.question: How do I fill the UDYAM Validity Year fields?
faqs.answer: In the 'From' field, enter the latest classification date from the Enterprise Type section of your UDYAM certificate. In the 'To' field, enter 9999.

faqs.question: How can I verify my UDYAM number?
faqs.answer: You can verify your UDYAM number status at https://udyamregistration.gov.in/Udyam_Verify.aspx

faqs.question: What format should the UDYAM certificate be uploaded in?
faqs.answer: Upload the scanned copy of the UDYAM (MSME) certificate in PDF or JPG format.

faqs.question: How do I fill FSSAI details?
faqs.answer: Fill these FSSAI fields: License Type (select from available options), FSSAI Number (must be 14 numeric digits), Expiry Date (enter the certificate's expiry date), and FSSAI Document (upload scanned copy in PDF/JPG format).

faqs.question: How can I check the Active/Inactive status of my FSSAI license?
faqs.answer: You can check the Active/Inactive status of your FSSAI license at https://foscos.fssai.gov.in/ - go to the FBO search option, enter the FSSAI number, enter the captcha, and click Search.

faqs.question: What bank details do I need to enter?
faqs.answer: Enter: Account Number (valid bank account number), IFSC Code (valid IFSC), Bank Name (auto-fetched from IFSC), Branch Name (auto-fetched from IFSC), Document Type (select used for bank verification), and Bank Document (upload scanned copy of the selected document).

faqs.question: Can I register a vendor without bank details?
faqs.answer: Yes. To register a vendor without bank details, fill Account Number as '123' and IFSC Code as 'IFSC0000123' as dummy values.

faqs.question: Where can I download the E-payment mandate form?
faqs.answer: You can download the E-payment mandate form template from the Download section on the top navigation bar of the portal.

faqs.question: How do I submit the request?
faqs.answer: After filling all required fields, click the Submit button. A Request ID will be generated and displayed in a pop-up window. Please note this Request ID for future reference.

faqs.question: How do I check the status of my delivery location request?
faqs.answer: Click on the 'Status Report' tab, select 'Delivery Location' from the dropdown under 'Report Type', and click 'Search'. The status of your vendor registration will be displayed.

faqs.question: What is the TAT for approval?
faqs.answer: Once the Request ID is generated, the turnaround time (TAT) for approval is 24 to 48 hours.

faqs.question: Who do I contact for login or technical issues?
faqs.answer: For any login-related or technical issues, contact rrsrportal@ril.com

fallback.answer: I'm not sure about that specific question. Please refer to the Add Delivery Location User Manual, contact your Reliance Buyer, or reach out to rrsrportal@ril.com for assistance.
